positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a glowing crescent moon nestled among delicate, bioluminescent forest flora and constellations. The central focus is a geometric celestial body combined with natural elements, rendered with clean, strong silhouettes and vibrant contrasting colors (deep indigo, ethereal teal, and pale gold). The composition should be circular and balanced, suitable for a repeating, high-contrast apparel print. Flat lay aesthetic with clear outlines and depth achieved through glowing effects. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets graphic modernism. Highly detailed, crisp edges, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, logo, writing, artifact, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, photorealism, jpeg artifacts, muted colors, complex background, clutter
